fields.Name: Approval
fields.Description: Agent needs explicit approval to proceed with an action. User responds with Approved or Rejected.

fields.Name: Information
fields.Description: Agent needs additional information or data from the user before it can continue processing.

fields.Name: Choice
fields.Description: Agent needs the user to select from a set of options. Options are defined in the request's ResponseSchema.

fields.Name: Review
fields.Description: Agent wants the user to review its output before proceeding. User can approve, request changes, or reject.

fields.Name: Custom
fields.Description: Agent-defined request type with a custom response schema. Used when none of the standard types apply.
